description: Manufacturer-neutral industrial component templates for PlantLens assembly studio.

safety_notes: Verify polarity before connecting DC loads.
Do not exceed rated output current.
components.description: Regulated DC bus supply for bench and small-plant loads.

fault_modes.title: Voltage Sag
fault_modes.description: Output voltage drops below nominal under load.
operator_actions: Measure load current and verify terminal torque.
Reduce parallel loads before resetting supply.

fault_modes.title: Overvoltage
operator_actions: Isolate downstream loads immediately.
Verify setpoint and regulator module before re-energizing.

fault_modes.title: Unstable Supply
fault_modes.description: Voltage oscillates or hunts under steady load.
operator_actions: Inspect input AC stability and DC filter capacitors.
Check for intermittent ground path on output return.

fault_modes.title: Loose Terminal
operator_actions: De-energize and re-torque output lugs to manufacturer spec.
Inspect for heat discoloration at terminal block.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><rect x="8" y="14" width="48" height="36" rx="4" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#1CC8FF" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M20 32h12l-6-12 6 24 6-18h12" fill="none" stroke="#1CC8FF" stroke-width="2"/></svg>

components.description: Step-up or step-down DC conversion stage between bus segments.

fault_modes.title: Input Undervoltage
operator_actions: Verify upstream supply voltage and cable drop.
Check input fuse and connector integrity.

fault_modes.title: Output Regulation Failure
operator_actions: Isolate load and measure output under no-load condition.
Replace converter module if no-load voltage is out of spec.

fault_modes.title: Thermal Shutdown
fault_modes.description: Converter shuts down due to overtemperature.
operator_actions: Verify airflow around heat sink and ambient temperature.
Reduce continuous load or add cooling path.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><polygon points="32,8 56,32 32,56 8,32" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#1CC8FF" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="16" y1="32" x2="48" y2="32" stroke="#1CC8FF" stroke-width="2"/></svg>

components.description: Energy storage module for ride-through and mobile bench setups.

fault_modes.title: Cell Imbalance
fault_modes.description: Individual cells drift outside balanced range.
operator_actions: Run balance cycle per BMS procedure.
Inspect for swollen cells before continued use.

fault_modes.title: Low State of Charge
operator_actions: Reduce non-critical loads.
Initiate controlled charge before next production run.

fault_modes.title: Thermal Risk
operator_actions: Isolate battery from load immediately.
Move module to ventilated area and follow facility EHS protocol.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><rect x="10" y="18" width="44" height="28" rx="3" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#1CC8FF" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="54" y="26" width="6" height="12" fill="#1CC8FF"/><line x1="18" y1="32" x2="46" y2="32" stroke="#1CC8FF" stroke-width="2"/></svg>

safety_notes: Use correct fuse class and ampacity.
Never bypass with wire or foil.
components.description: Overcurrent protection between supply segments and loads.

fault_modes.title: Blown Fuse
fault_modes.description: Fuse element has opened due to overcurrent.
operator_actions: Isolate upstream supply before replacing fuse.
Investigate downstream short or locked rotor before re-energizing.

fault_modes.title: Nuisance Opening
fault_modes.description: Fuse opens under inrush without sustained fault.
operator_actions: Verify fuse rating matches load inrush profile.
Consider time-delay fuse class if inrush is legitimate.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><rect x="14" y="12" width="36" height="40" rx="2" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#EF4444" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="32" y1="16" x2="32" y2="48" stroke="#F59E0B" stroke-width="3"/></svg>

components.description: Electromechanical switching for load enable and interlock paths.

fault_modes.title: Welded Contacts
fault_modes.description: Contacts remain closed when coil is de-energized.
operator_actions: Isolate supply and verify contact state with meter.
Replace contactor before returning to service.

fault_modes.title: Open Coil
fault_modes.description: Coil circuit failed; contactor will not pull in.
operator_actions: Measure coil voltage at terminals during commanded ON.
Inspect PLC output and wiring continuity.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><rect x="10" y="16" width="44" height="32" rx="4" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#1CC8FF" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="24" cy="32" r="6" fill="none" stroke="#1CC8FF" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="36" y="26" width="12" height="12" fill="#1CC8FF" opacity="0.4"/></svg>

components.description: Digital output bank for enabling relays, valves, and indicator states.

fault_modes.title: Output Stuck High
fault_modes.description: Digital output remains ON when commanded OFF.
operator_actions: Verify commanded state in PLC logic monitor.
Isolate affected load before replacing output module.

fault_modes.title: Output Stuck Low
fault_modes.description: Digital output will not energize when commanded ON.
operator_actions: Check field wiring and load return path.
Swap channel to confirm module vs wiring fault.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><rect x="8" y="12" width="48" height="40" rx="3" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#1CC8FF" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="14" y="20" width="8" height="8" fill="#2DD4BF"/><rect x="26" y="20" width="8" height="8" fill="#2DD4BF"/><rect x="38" y="20" width="8" height="8" fill="#EF4444"/></svg>

components.description: Analog input bank for sensor scaling and thresholding.

fault_modes.title: Input Saturation
operator_actions: Verify sensor wiring and excitation.
Check scaling constants in PLC tag map.

fault_modes.title: Excessive Noise
fault_modes.description: Input signal noisy beyond filter capability.
operator_actions: Inspect shield termination and ground loop.
Relocate sensor cable away from power conductors.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><rect x="8" y="12" width="48" height="40" rx="3" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#1CC8FF" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M14 40 L22 28 L30 36 L38 22 L46 40" fill="none" stroke="#8B5CF6" stroke-width="2"/></svg>

safety_notes: Lock out drive before mechanical service.
Keep fingers clear of rotating shaft.
components.description: Brushed DC motor for bench conveyor and fan drive applications.

fault_modes.title: Mechanical Obstruction
fault_modes.description: Rotor cannot turn freely due to jam.
operator_actions: Isolate power and manually verify shaft rotation.
Remove obstruction before re-energizing.

fault_modes.title: Bearing Friction
operator_actions: Listen for grinding at low speed.
Schedule bearing replacement before seizure.

fault_modes.title: Undervoltage Stall
fault_modes.description: Motor stalls due to insufficient supply voltage.
operator_actions: Measure supply at motor terminals under load.
Verify cable gauge and connection integrity.

fault_modes.title: Overcurrent
operator_actions: Reduce mechanical load and verify free rotation.
Check for shorted windings if no mechanical cause.

fault_modes.title: Sensor Dropout
operator_actions: Inspect encoder or shunt wiring.
Compare against redundant measurement if available.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="20" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#2DD4BF" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="6" fill="#2DD4BF"/><line x1="32" y1="12" x2="32" y2="20" stroke="#2DD4BF" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="32" y1="44" x2="32" y2="52" stroke="#2DD4BF" stroke-width="2"/></svg>

components.description: Brushless fan for enclosure cooling and airflow circulation.

fault_modes.title: Blade Obstruction
operator_actions: Isolate power and inspect inlet guard.
Remove debris before restart.

fault_modes.title: Low Speed
operator_actions: Verify PWM command and supply voltage.
Check for bearing drag or blade imbalance.

fault_modes.title: Blade Imbalance
operator_actions: Inspect blades for damage or buildup.
Replace fan module if vibration persists.

fault_modes.title: Coupling Slip
operator_actions: Inspect set screw torque on hub.
Verify shaft alignment with drive source.

fault_modes.title: Airflow Degradation
operator_actions: Check filter upstream restriction.
Verify duct path is not collapsed or blocked.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="18" fill="none" stroke="#2DD4BF" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M32 14 Q42 32 32 50 Q22 32 32 14" fill="#2DD4BF" opacity="0.3"/><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="4" fill="#2DD4BF"/></svg>

components.description: High-flow blower for process ventilation and pneumatic feed.

fault_modes.title: Inlet Blockage
operator_actions: Inspect blower inlet guard and remove obstruction after isolating power.

fault_modes.title: Outlet Restriction
fault_modes.description: Downstream damper or duct collapse limits flow.
operator_actions: Verify damper position and duct integrity.
Check filter differential across blower path.

fault_modes.title: Weak Output
fault_modes.description: Blower cannot reach design flow at rated speed.
operator_actions: Measure current and RPM under load.
Inspect impeller for wear or fouling.

fault_modes.title: Vibration Imbalance
operator_actions: Schedule impeller inspection and balancing.
Reduce speed until vibration within limits.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><rect x="12" y="20" width="40" height="24" rx="2" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#2DD4BF" stroke-width="2"/><polygon points="52,32 60,24 60,40" fill="#2DD4BF"/><circle cx="24" cy="32" r="8" fill="none" stroke="#2DD4BF" stroke-width="2"/></svg>

components.description: Fluid mover for coolant, process, and tank transfer loops.

fault_modes.title: Dry Run
operator_actions: Shut down immediately and verify suction level.
Prime pump before restart per procedure.

fault_modes.title: Clogged Impeller
operator_actions: Isolate and inspect impeller housing.
Install strainer upstream if debris is recurring.

fault_modes.title: Cavitation
fault_modes.description: Vapor bubbles form due to low NPSH.
operator_actions: Verify suction head and fluid temperature.
Reduce speed until cavitation noise subsides.

fault_modes.title: Low Flow
operator_actions: Check valve positions and filter restriction.
Verify motor speed and impeller condition.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><circle cx="28" cy="32" r="16" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#2DD4BF" stroke-width="2"/><polygon points="44,24 56,32 44,40" fill="#2DD4BF"/><line x1="20" y1="32" x2="8" y2="32" stroke="#2DD4BF" stroke-width="2"/></svg>

components.description: Electrically actuated valve for fluid or pneumatic routing.

fault_modes.title: Stuck Open
fault_modes.description: Valve remains open when commanded closed.
operator_actions: Isolate upstream pressure before service.
Replace valve assembly if coil de-energized but flow continues.

fault_modes.title: Stuck Closed
fault_modes.description: Valve will not open when commanded.
operator_actions: Verify coil voltage during commanded open.
Inspect for debris on seat and plunger.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><rect x="20" y="14" width="24" height="36" rx="2" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#2DD4BF" stroke-width="2"/><polygon points="32,8 40,18 24,18" fill="#2DD4BF"/><line x1="8" y1="32" x2="20" y2="32" stroke="#2DD4BF" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="44" y1="32" x2="56" y2="32" stroke="#2DD4BF" stroke-width="2"/></svg>

components.description: Flexible belt drive between motor shaft and driven equipment.

fault_modes.title: Belt Slip
operator_actions: Check belt tension per manufacturer spec.
Inspect for glaze or oil contamination on pulley.

fault_modes.title: Belt Wear
fault_modes.description: Visible cracking or fraying on belt.
operator_actions: Replace belt before complete failure.
Verify pulley alignment to prevent edge wear.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><circle cx="20" cy="32" r="10" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#2DD4BF" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="44" cy="32" r="10" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#2DD4BF" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="28" y="28" width="8" height="8" fill="#2DD4BF"/></svg>

components.description: Shaft support bearing for motor and fan assemblies.

fault_modes.title: Lubrication Loss
fault_modes.description: Insufficient lubricant causes heat and wear.
operator_actions: Verify grease interval and quantity.
Inspect for seal leak at bearing housing.

fault_modes.title: Race Damage
fault_modes.description: Pitting or spalling on bearing race.
operator_actions: Reduce speed and schedule replacement.
Analyze vibration spectrum for bearing defect frequencies.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="36" height="36" rx="4" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#2DD4BF" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="12" fill="none" stroke="#2DD4BF" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="4" fill="#2DD4BF"/></svg>

components.description: Conducts airflow between blower, fan, and process zones.

fault_modes.title: Duct Blockage
operator_actions: Inspect access panels for debris or collapsed liner.
Verify damper not partially closed downstream.

fault_modes.title: Duct Leak
fault_modes.description: Leak at joint reduces delivered airflow.
operator_actions: Pressurize section and locate leak with smoke pencil.
Reseal joint with rated duct sealant.

fault_modes.title: Flow Restriction
operator_actions: Measure differential pressure across duct segment.
Schedule cleaning if DP exceeds baseline.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><rect x="8" y="24" width="48" height="16" rx="2" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#8B5CF6" stroke-width="2"/><polygon points="56,32 64,26 64,38" fill="#8B5CF6" opacity="0.5"/></svg>

components.description: Rigid pipe segment for fluid transfer between pump and tank.

fault_modes.title: Pipe Leak
fault_modes.description: Fluid escape at fitting or wall.
operator_actions: Isolate segment and depressurize before repair.
Replace compromised section if wall thinning detected.

fault_modes.title: Partial Blockage
fault_modes.description: Scale or debris reduces effective diameter.
operator_actions: Flush segment per maintenance procedure.
Inspect upstream strainer condition.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><rect x="8" y="28" width="48" height="8" rx="4" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#8B5CF6" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="8" cy="32" r="4" fill="#8B5CF6"/><circle cx="56" cy="32" r="4" fill="#8B5CF6"/></svg>

components.description: Storage vessel for coolant or process fluid inventory.

fault_modes.title: Low Level
fault_modes.description: Fluid inventory below minimum operating level.
operator_actions: Verify inlet supply and valve positions.
Add fluid per specification before resuming pump operation.

fault_modes.title: Overfill Risk
operator_actions: Close fill valve and verify overflow path.
Check level sensor calibration against manual gauge.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><rect x="16" y="20" width="32" height="32" rx="2" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#8B5CF6" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="16" y1="36" x2="48" y2="36" stroke="#8B5CF6" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/></svg>

components.description: Mesh or cartridge filter introducing controlled flow restriction.

fault_modes.title: Partial Blockage
operator_actions: Compare DP to clean baseline.
Replace or clean filter element per schedule.

fault_modes.title: Full Blockage
operator_actions: Stop upstream pump to prevent damage.
Replace filter element before restart.

fault_modes.title: Contamination Buildup
operator_actions: Trend DP over operating hours.
Advance maintenance interval if slope exceeds baseline.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><rect x="14" y="16" width="36" height="32" rx="2" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#8B5CF6" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="20" y1="22" x2="44" y2="42" stroke="#F59E0B" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="44" y1="22" x2="20" y2="42" stroke="#F59E0B" stroke-width="1"/></svg>

components.description: Hall or shunt-based current measurement for motor and supply monitoring.

fault_modes.title: Missing Signal
operator_actions: Verify excitation and loop power.
Check wiring continuity to analog input.

fault_modes.title: Stale Signal
operator_actions: Compare against second measurement path.
Replace sensor if frozen under known load step.

fault_modes.title: Noisy Signal
operator_actions: Route cable away from motor leads.
Add ferrite and verify shield ground at one end only.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><rect x="12" y="18" width="40" height="28" rx="3" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#F59E0B" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M20 32 C26 24 30 40 36 32" fill="none" stroke="#8B5CF6" stroke-width="2"/></svg>

components.description: Divider or isolated voltage measurement for bus monitoring.

fault_modes.title: Missing Signal
operator_actions: Verify tap connection and fuse upstream.
Measure raw voltage at terminals with DMM.

fault_modes.title: Impossible Reading
operator_actions: Check scaling and ADC range in PLC.
Inspect for short on sense leads.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><rect x="12" y="18" width="40" height="28" rx="3" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#F59E0B" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M18 38 L24 22 L30 38 L36 26" fill="none" stroke="#8B5CF6" stroke-width="2"/></svg>

components.description: Rotational speed sensor for shafts and fan hubs.

fault_modes.title: Missing Signal
operator_actions: Verify sensor gap to target wheel.
Inspect connector for intermittent contact.

fault_modes.title: Stuck Value
fault_modes.description: RPM reading constant despite speed change.
operator_actions: Swap channel to confirm sensor vs input fault.
Clean optical or magnetic target surface.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="18" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#F59E0B" stroke-width="2"/><text x="32" y="36" text-anchor="middle" fill="#F59E0B" font-size="10" font-family="monospace">RPM</text></svg>

components.description: Accelerometer or velocity probe for rotating equipment health.

fault_modes.title: Missing Signal
operator_actions: Verify sensor power and cable integrity.
Re-seat mount bolt to rated torque.

fault_modes.title: Noisy Signal
fault_modes.description: Signal dominated by electrical or structural noise.
operator_actions: Confirm sensor mounted on rigid surface.
Filter out known structural resonance in analysis.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><rect x="14" y="20" width="36" height="24" rx="2" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#F59E0B" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M16 32 L22 26 L28 38 L34 28 L40 36 L46 30" fill="none" stroke="#EF4444" stroke-width="2"/></svg>

components.description: RTD or thermistor for motor, bearing, and fluid temperature.

fault_modes.title: Missing Signal
operator_actions: Inspect lead wire at termination.
Verify excitation current on RTD loop.

fault_modes.title: Impossible Reading
operator_actions: Check sensor type configuration in PLC.
Verify sensor seated on heat source.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><circle cx="32" cy="28" r="12" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#F59E0B" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="29" y="38" width="6" height="14" fill="#F59E0B"/></svg>

components.description: Hot-wire or differential sensor for duct and blower airflow.

fault_modes.title: Missing Signal
operator_actions: Verify sensor seated in flow path.
Check for ice or debris on probe element.

fault_modes.title: Stale Signal
fault_modes.description: Reading unchanged during known flow change.
operator_actions: Command blower speed step and verify response.
Recalibrate sensor span if drift confirmed.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><path d="M16 40 Q32 16 48 40" fill="none" stroke="#F59E0B" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="24" y1="32" x2="40" y2="32" stroke="#8B5CF6" stroke-width="2"/></svg>

components.description: Gauge or differential pressure transducer for fluid and air systems.

fault_modes.title: Missing Signal
operator_actions: Verify tap not plugged.
Inspect transmitter power and 4-20mA loop.

fault_modes.title: Stuck Value
operator_actions: Vent tap and verify response.
Replace transducer if diaphragm suspected seized.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="16" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#F59E0B" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="32" y1="16" x2="32" y2="8" stroke="#F59E0B" stroke-width="2"/><text x="32" y="36" text-anchor="middle" fill="#F59E0B" font-size="9">PSI</text></svg>

components.description: Mechanical or proximity switch for end-of-travel and guard interlock.

fault_modes.title: Missing Signal
operator_actions: Verify actuator alignment and travel.
Test contact continuity with meter.

fault_modes.title: Stuck Value
fault_modes.description: State does not change when released.
operator_actions: Inspect for mechanical binding on lever.
Replace switch if contact welded.

visual_asset.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#08111F" rx="6"/><rect x="16" y="20" width="32" height="24" rx="2" fill="#0E1A2A" stroke="#F59E0B" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="6" fill="#2DD4BF"/></svg>
